teams.name: Core
teams.description: The core team members that contribute to various projects within the organization.

teams.name: Tech Leads
teams.description: Directs Tech projects. Reviews, and approves some Pull Requests.

teams.name: AI Leads
teams.description: Oversees all AI repositories. Has full rights to manage AI projects, merge code, and approve Pull Requests.

teams.name: Website Leads
teams.description: Manages website repositories. Has full rights to merge code in web projects and approve Pull Requests.

teams.name: Bot Leads
teams.description: Directs bot development. Reviews, approves, and merges Pull Requests from Bot Developers.

teams.name: ML Engineers
teams.description: Contributes to machine learning and AI repositories.

teams.name: Backend Engineers
teams.description: Contributes to website and backend projects.

teams.name: Frontend Engineers
teams.description: Contributes to website and frontend projects.
